properties.text:
===== This document is only for Level-A personnel =====
*** NEXT PETROL SECURE COMMS ***
STATUS: CODE BLACK | BREAKOUT CONFIRMED LOCATION: ISLAND MAIN SECTOR AUDIO TRANSCRIPT: Military Record #20260807
// DEPLOYMENT ORDERS // LAP #01 [MILITARY]: Mobilize to external grid. Lethal force authorized. Neutralize the threat and secure the shoreline. LAP #02 [SCIENTISTS]: Evacuate to Sub-Level Labs. Prepare cross-breeding protein samples for emergency stabilization. LAP #03 [ENGINEERS]: Immediate structural support required. Barricade protocols active. Seal all modular access points, doors, and windows.
// THREAT ADVISORY // Internal security suspects foul play. Radar anomalies suggest the rogue pirate radio cell and affiliated mercenaries triggered the breach. Their objective is the total destruction of our humanitarian operations and corporate infrastructure.
Do not trust unaffiliated survivors. They are armed, hostile, and actively attempting to sabotage our global relief efforts.
WE POWER THE WORLD. DO NOT LET THEM BREAK IT. [MESSAGE ENDS]
